# cloudinary_trigger (Resource)

Manages a Cloudinary webhook notification trigger. Triggers fire on specific asset events and POST a payload to a configured URL. Up to 30 triggers per product environment (the console UI shows only 10).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Minimal: fire on every upload event.
resource "cloudinary_trigger" "on_upload" {
  uri        = "https://example.com/webhooks/cloudinary"
  event_type = "upload"
}

# Filtered: only fire for image uploads, using a JSONLogic expression.
resource "cloudinary_trigger" "on_image_upload" {
  uri        = "https://example.com/webhooks/cloudinary-images"
  event_type = "upload"
  filter     = jsonencode({ "==" = [{ "var" = "resource_type" }, "image"] })
}

# Custom payload template (Mustache) with EdDSA v2 signature verification.
resource "cloudinary_trigger" "on_delete_custom" {
  uri        = "https://example.com/webhooks/cloudinary-delete"
  event_type = "delete"
  auth_scheme = "eddsa_v2"

  payload_template = jsonencode({
    event = {
      type      = "{{event.type}}"
      timestamp = "{{event.timestamp}}"
    }
    asset = {
      public_id = "{{asset.public_id}}"
      url       = "{{asset.url}}"
    }
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `event_type` (String) The event that fires the trigger. One of: upload, delete, rename, move, eager, explode, multi, resource_tags_changed, resource_context_changed, resource_metadata_changed, resource_display_name_changed, access_control_changed, related_assets, create_folder, delete_folder, move_or_rename_asset_folder, proof_status_changed, error, all.
- `uri` (String) The webhook URL to which Cloudinary sends the notification payload.

### Optional

- `additive` (Boolean) When true, this global trigger fires in addition to any per-asset notification_url. Default false.
- `auth_scheme` (String) Signature method for verifying incoming webhook payloads. One of: default, legacy_hmac, eddsa_v2.
- `filter` (String) A JSONLogic expression (JSON-encoded) that filters which events fire this trigger. When set, filter_language is automatically sent as "jsonlogic". Example: "{\"==\":[{\"var\":\"resource_type\"},\"image\"]}"
- `payload_template` (String) A Mustache template object (JSON-encoded, max 16KB) that customises the notification payload. Available namespaces: event, asset, folder, eager, error, raw.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp of when the trigger was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the trigger assigned by Cloudinary.
- `product_environment_id` (String) The product environment this trigger is scoped to.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp of when the trigger was last updated.
- `uri_type` (String) The type of the URI. Always "webhook".
